articles.description: The 2026 summer transfer window is open. Here is how we rated the biggest deals.

articles.headline: Fraud case against ex-Serie A referee chief dropped
articles.description: Milan's public prosecutor has dismissed the case against former Italian referee designator Gianluca Rocchi and his deputy Andrea Gervasoni for alleged sports fraud.

articles.headline: Spain's win vs. France ends incredible World Cup final streak
articles.description: For the past 11 World Cup finals, both Bayern Munich and Inter Milan had been represented. But that amazing streak is now over for one of those clubs.

articles.description: AS Roma are keen to land Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: New Napoli coach Allegri says Milan collapse 'weighed on me'
articles.description: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

articles.headline: Transfer big board: Best players in each position who could move this summer
articles.description: The transfer window is open in Premier League and will be soon in Europe, so who is available? It's our big board!

images.name: Mike Maignan [1296x729]
images.caption: Mike Maignan has been subject to interest from Chelsea, among others.
images.credit: Giuseppe Cottini/AC Milan via Getty Images

images.name: Nico Schlotterbeck [1296x729]
images.caption: Nico Schlotterbeck has reportedly been subject to interest from Real Madrid.

images.name: Denzel Dumfries [1296x729]
images.caption: Denzel Dumfries is close to joining Real Madrid.

images.name: Marc Cucurella [1296x729]
images.caption: Marc Cucurella has been linked with an exit from Chelsea this summer.

images.name: Elliot Anderson [1296x729]
images.caption: Elliot Anderson is at the center of a bidding war between multiple Premier League clubs.
images.credit: Maynard Manyowa/News Images/NurPhoto via Getty Images

images.name: Morgan Rogers [1296x729]
images.caption: Morgan Rogers helped Aston Villa to win the Europa Leaue title last season.

images.name: Yan Diomande [1296x729]
images.caption: Yan Diomande had 12 goals and eight assists in his first full season in Europe.
images.credit: Ronny HARTMANN / AFP via Getty Images

images.name: Julian Alvarez [1296x729]
images.caption: Julián Álvarez could demand a high transfer fee if he leaves Atleti.

images.name: Could Marcus Rashford play for Man United next season?
images.caption: Mark Ogden shares details on Marcus Rashford future as reports emerge he could return to play for Man United.
